title: Top M.Pharm (Pharmaceutics) College in Noida
content: The M. Pharm program is designed to provide students with comprehensive and practical training for formulation and development required in Pharmaceutical Industry. Pharmaceutics is the discipline of Pharmacy that specially deals with all facets of the process of dosage form designing and developing drug delivery system. The course is taught through a combination of lectures, seminars, flipped classes, project and research-based learning. The Department has adequate infrastructure, laboratory facilities, central instrument facilities for research and a treasure trove of books for the students. 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08 09 10 11 01 To bear strong professional competence in Pharmaceutical Sciences with innovative approaches in R&D. 02 To undertake the responsibilities in health care system with understanding of needs of Industry/ Government organizations. 03 To imbibe unique expertise to develop entrepreneurship and acumen for sustainable development. 01 Understanding the drug delivery system concepts to create, innovative formulations and effective dosage forms by using quality assurance and technology transfer solutions. 02 Examine critique, organize, improvise, and manage documents, data, and information pertaining to the Pharmaceutical manufacturing process. 03 Able to establish a Pharmaceutical manufacturing unit in the form of pilot scale technique to create and develop pharmaceutical dosage forms.
